content.en:
Facing the Lord of the Void Land, Ye Tian directly cast the Cave Extreme Escape Method, which is a magical technique on the other side.

Wow!

Ye Tian's speed was extremely fast.

Even if the Lord of the Void Earth performed the Technique of the Other Shore that could limit speed, it could not limit the Cave Extreme Escape Technique.

However, the Lord of the Void Earth would defend against the other side's supernatural powers, blocking Ye Tian's attacks again and again.

And the Lord of the Void Land has many means.

At this time, it is a competition to see who has more hole cards and who will make mistakes.

One after another other side of the art was displayed, and the two sides fought non-stop.

Gradually, Ye Tian understood the attack method of the Lord of the Void Land very well, and the Lord of the Void Heaven also understood Ye Tian's attack method.

But Ye Tian created too many techniques on the other side, plus he still had one-third of his flesh body on the other side of the golden body, while the Lord of the Void Land only had a quarter of the flesh on the other side of the golden body.

Therefore, his advantage is still great.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian grasped a flaw of the Lord of the Void Land and used a technique of the other side to create an advantage, thus injuring the Lord of the Void Land.

This injury is the hope of victory.

At last.

The Lord of the Void Land was suffering more and more, and Ye Tian gradually gained the upper hand.

In the end, Ye Tian won the game.

Defeating the Lord of the Void Land, this battle made Ye Tian completely famous.

After all, the Lord of the Void Land was one of the other shore-level geniuses who had the hope of being promoted to the top ten before, and Ye Tian had not shown the combat power of the top ten even before, even if he was powerful.

But now, others think he has a chance of moving up to the top 10.

In the next three games, Ye Tian still defeated his opponent and won five wins in five battles.

In this way, the third round ended and he managed to advance to the top 20.

......

Come out and rest.

The Lord of Eternal Zero was thrilled.

"Lord of Endless, you have a chance to advance to the top 10 now!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero smiled.

"I hope I can be promoted, in that case, I can get a great opportunity!" Ye Tiandao.

"Well, as long as you finish in the top ten, that chance will be yours. Don't think too much about it next, you can win the tenth place, there is no difference between the first place and the tenth place, it's just a difference in reputation, and it has no impact on chance. "The Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Soon after, the fourth round began.

There are still five matches to be played in this round, and once the record reaches the top 10, it will be the top 10.

"In the fourth round, every battle will be tough, and you may even need to play extra games to hope for a break into the top 10!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, in the fourth round, he needs to go all out, and he can't hide his strength at all.

Soon.

At the beginning of the fourth round, Ye Tian's first game was against another top-ten genius who had a top ten-level talent, the Lord of Honor!

The battle began.

Ye Tian directly cast the magic power of the other side of the realm-the other side of the void domain!

Rumble!!!

As soon as this supernatural technique on the other side was unleashed, it directly suppressed the strength of the Lord of Light Compliance.

"The supernatural power of the other side of the realm class!"

The Lord of Light was amazed.

He didn't expect that in the fourth round, Ye Tian still hid his strength, and he hadn't shown it before!

Rival!

Bang!!!!

The Lord of Light Compliance withstood the suppression of the Void Domain on the other side and fought with Ye Tian.

The Void on the other side!

Escape from the Cave!

The other side of the golden mang!

The Golden Cover on the other side!

Ye Tian used all the magic skills of the four other sides, just to defeat the Lord of Guangzun.

After a long period of fighting, Ye Tian finally used the golden mangs on the other side to shatter the defenses of the Lord of Light Compliance, leaving injuries on his body.

And that's where the victory begins!

After a while, the weakness of the Lord of Light became apparent, and the injuries became more and more serious.

At last.

Rumble!!!

The Lord of Light was knocked out and his body began to crack.

"Throw in the towel!"

The Lord of Light Obedience said helplessly.

Defeating the Lord of Light, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

This means that he is very close to the top 10.

The second opponent is the Lord of the Void Land.

This time.

With all his might, he quickly defeated the Lord of the Void.

The third opponent was slightly weaker than the Lord of the Void Land, so he won again.

But.

The fourth opponent is very strong, the other party is also three battles and three wins, the strength is a little stronger than the Lord of Guangzun, it is the Lord of the Nine Evils from the Holy Mountain on the other side.

The degree of the golden embodiment of the Lord of the Nine Evils on the other side is higher than that of Ye Tian, and there are several supernatural powers on the other side, and they are supernatural powers on the other side that can cooperate with each other to fight.

The most important thing is that the other party has mastered a lot of other skills.

As for the high-level divine weapons on the other side, the other party naturally has them.

Thundered!!!

The battle began.

After a period of fighting, Ye Tian's golden cover on the other side was broken by the other party.

But at the critical moment, he used the other side of the misty body, the other side of the technique, to divert the damage.

But the attack power of the supernatural power on the other side is too terrifying, even if it is the body of the mist on the other side, it can't completely transfer the damage, and it still suffers a little injury.

And the other party was not too good, and was also injured by Ye Tian.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian and the Nine Evil Lord's injuries were getting worse and worse, and it was even difficult to recover.

But their battle is still ongoing.

Boom!!!!

One of Ye Tian's arms, one of the legs of the Lord of the Nine Evils, was shattered at the same time, and it was shattered by the magic technique of the other side, so it was difficult to recover in a short period of time, and the arms and legs that were forcibly recovered were just arms and legs with no combat effectiveness, which were useless.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian's body was pierced, and so was the Lord of the Nine Evils.

As time passed, the injuries became more and more life-threatening, and the Lord of the Nine Evils panicked.

The reason why Ye Tian didn't panic was because this body was a copy of the body, and if it fell, it would fall, so it was no big deal.

But if the body of the Lord of the Nine Evils fell, it really fell, and he was naturally panicked.

This panic has a flaw.

In addition, Ye Tian was extremely desperate, completely disregarding his life.

Gradually, Ye Tian gained the upper hand.

"Crazy, is it necessary to fight like this?"

In desperation, the Lord of the Nine Evils chose to admit defeat and was unwilling to fight with Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

He immediately went down to heal his wounds, or else his life would be lost.

And Ye Tian also went down, and the Lord of Eternal Zero made a move to stabilize his body so that his body would not collapse.

"Lord of Endless, you are too risky this time, if the other party does not admit defeat, I am afraid that you may all fall!" said the Lord of Eternal Zero.

"I won, didn't I?"

Ye Tian said very calmly.

"yes, you've won four games, you should be in the top 10, even if you lose the fifth game, it doesn't matter. "The Lord of Eternal Zero.
